{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Greenpeak
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Greenpeak]] is connected to four other towns at roughly the same altitude.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Greenpeak]] has grown from a village into a bustling town.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
